## MSG_03F
The Rescue command allows you[LF]
to carry allies to protect them.[A][LF]
A unit can only be rescued if its Con stat[LF]
is lower than the rescuer's Aid stat.[A][LF]
You can see a unit's Con and Aid[LF]
values on the unit data screen.[A][LF]
While a unit is carrying another,[A][LF]
its combat statistics are lowered[LF]
significantly, so be careful.[A][LF]
After rescuing a unit,[A][LF]
you can drop it onto a space by[LF]
using the Drop command.[A][LF]
Or if you prefer,[A][LF]
you can pass it to another unit[LF]
with the Give or Take commands.[A][LF]
Remember, however, that you can[LF]
only perform one command per turn.[A][X]

## MSG_040
The Trade command allows a unit[LF]
to trade items with other units.[A][LF]
If you select the command and[LF]
press the A Button,[A][LF]
the two units' inventories will[LF]
be displayed.[A][LF]
You may select which items you[LF]
want to trade with the A Button.[A][LF]
If you just want to give or[LF]
take an item,[A][LF]
trade that item to an empty[LF]
space.[A][LF]
If you give all of a unit's[LF]
weapons to another unit,[A][LF]
it won't be able to fight,[LF]
however, so use caution.[A][X]

can give to your units.[A][LF]

If you're finished with a unit,[LF]
select Wait to end its turn.[A][LF]
Remember that you can cancel[LF]
with the B Button,[A][LF]
but if you select Wait you can't[LF]
take it back,[A][LF]
so make sure you're finished[LF]

[OpenMidLeft]Anyone in charge of an army[LF]
gains traits like that.[A][LF]
If Roy didn't grow, the army[LF]
would be doomed.[A][LF]
[OpenMidRight]General Cecilia, you said before[LF]
that I would lead Ostia.[A][LF]
[OpenMidLeft]Yes, you are Lord Hector's[LF]
only heir after all.[A][LF]
[OpenMidRight][ToggleSmile]Do you think I could be[LF]
like Roy? I mean...[A][LF]
I couldn't even recognize[LF]
traitors in my own castle...[A][LF]
[OpenMidLeft][ToggleSmile]People grow according to their[LF]
potential.[A][LF]
Even I didn't know what to do at[LF]
first when I was made Mage General.[A][LF]
I was taken from Ostia and brought[LF]
to Aquileia. It was overwhelming.[A][LF]
[OpenMidRight][ToggleSmile]But you succeeded[LF]
because of your talent...[A][LF]
[OpenMidLeft][ToggleSmile]That's not what I'm getting at.[A][LF]
I've only made it so far thanks[LF]
to Perceval and General Douglas.[A][LF]
Don't think that you'll have to[LF]
do everything on your own.[A][LF]
[OpenMidRight][ToggleSmile]Oh...[A][LF]
[OpenMidLeft][ToggleSmile]Even Roy isn't fighting alone.[A][LF]
He puts his faith in everyone[LF]
around him.[A][LF]
That is another important[LF]
attribute for someone in power.[A][LF]
The ability to depend on others[LF]
when you need them.[A][LF]
[OpenMidRight][ToggleSmile]Can I depend on you, too?[A][LF]
[OpenMidLeft][ToggleSmile]Of course.[A][LF]
I'll be glad to offer you[LF]
any help when you need it.[A][LF]
[OpenMidRight]Thank you![A][X]

## MSG_761
[OpenMidRight][ToggleSmile]Your search led you to Zephiel?[A][LF]
[OpenMidLeft][LF]
Yes.[A][LF]
I located Zephiel by following the[LF]
energy emitted by the demon dragon.[A][LF]
I remember the exact words in the[LF]
conversation we had.[A][LF]
"For what reason have you awakened[LF]
a demon dragon?" I asked him.[A][LF]
He was a strange one. With a bored[LF]
look on his face, he simply asked,[A][LF]
"Who are you?" to which I answered,[LF]
"Dragon."[A][LF]
To that, a smile crept onto his[LF]
face.[A][LF]
It was then he told me that he wanted[LF]
to give the world to the dragons.[A][LF]
[OpenMidRight][ToggleMouthMove]......[A][ToggleMouthMove][LF]
[OpenMidLeft]Frankly, I didn't trust him,[A][LF]
but I accepted him as the new[LF]
leader of the demon dragon.[A][LF]
He ordered it to liberate the[LF]
world from humans.[A][LF]
He wanted it to rule the[LF]
world in their place.[A][LF]
[OpenMidRight][LF]
Zephiel is dead now.[LF]
What is the demon dragon doing?[A][LF]
[OpenMidLeft][LF]
It is in this sanctuary, waiting for[LF]
its chance to liberate the world.[A][LF]
[OpenMidRight][LF]
What?! Even with her[LF]
leader gone?![A][LF]
Have you taken on the[LF]
role of leader now?[A][LF]
[OpenMidLeft][LF]
There is no need for that.[A][LF]
Zephiel ordered it to proceed[LF]
even in the event of his death.[A][LF]
Idunn will continue until control[LF]
is wrested from humans.[A][LF]
[OpenMidRight][LF]
She is nothing but a slave![A][LF]
Her soul was destroyed and now[LF]
she's bound to a dead man's order![A][LF]
[OpenMidLeft][LF]
Do you pity her as Hartmut did?[A][LF]
...Foolish human. Your kind[LF]
makes no sense.[A][LF]
Allow me to tell you one more[LF]
thing.[A][LF]
No matter how you may want it,[A][LF]
dragons and humans will never be[LF]
able to live in harmony.[A][LF]
The differences between our two[LF]
species are simply too great.[A][LF]
[OpenMidRight][LF]
That's not true![A][LF]
I know of a village where dragons[LF]
and humans live in peace![A][LF]
I know a greater peace is[LF]
possible with effort![A][LF]
[OpenMidLeft][LF]
Humans and dragons living[LF]
together?[A][CR][LF]
Stop your lies.[A][LF]
I will not humor such an[LF]
obvious falsehood.[A][CR][LF]
Now, step forward. Let us see[LF]
whose strength is greater![A][X]

the nation's main source of[LF]

## MSG_B0C
The now free Kingdom of Etruria[LF]
joins forces with the Lycian Army.[A][LF]
Now a joint force under the name of the[LF]
Etrurian Army,[A][LF]
[LoadOverworldFaces]their first mission is to enter Ilia[LF]
and finish off the revolutionaries.[A][LF]
[LoadOverworldFaces]After that, they plan to launch a[LF]
direct attack on Bern.[A][LF]
[LoadOverworldFaces]Roy, nominated as leader of[LF]
the Etrurian Army,[A][LF]
has the powerful support of[LF]
the St. Elimine Church.[A][LF]
With the church's support comes[LF]
also the support of the people.[A][X]

the freezing cold of Ilia,[A][LF]

knights of Ilia have sided with Bern.[A][LF]

located on the Ilian border...[A][X]

knights into submission.[A][LF]

speedy advance to Edessa,[A][LF]

Ilian mercenary groups for aid.[A][LF]

their replies are not promising...[A][X]

Army to form a unified force.[A][LF]

of the revolution,[A][LF]

offensive against Bern.[A][LF]

will begin the offensive in Sacae.[A][X]
